title: Lateral Movement via SMB — Internal Subnet Sweep
mitre_technique: T1021.002 — Remote Services: SMB/Windows Admin Shares
raw_evidence: 2025-07-14T02:17:43Z — Host 10.0.4.88 initiated SMB connections to 24 hosts in 10.0.4.0/24 over 90 seconds.
2025-07-14T02:17:51Z — Successful authentication to \\10.0.4.12\ADMIN$ using domain account svc_backup (not normally active after 22:00).
2025-07-14T02:18:03Z — PsExec artefact (PSEXESVC.exe) written to C:\Windows\System32 on 10.0.4.12.
2025-07-14T02:18:09Z — cmd.exe spawned as child of PSEXESVC.exe on 10.0.4.12; command: whoami /all && net localgroup administrators.
2025-07-14T02:18:22Z — EDR telemetry: credential dump attempt detected on 10.0.4.12 (lsass.exe accessed by non-system process).
2025-07-14T02:18:44Z — svc_backup account authenticated to 3 additional hosts: 10.0.4.31, 10.0.4.55, 10.0.4.67.
2025-07-14T02:19:01Z — No prior subnet sweep behaviour observed for 10.0.4.88 in the last 90 days.
